Name: Expanded Dungeons
Author: McBurn
Description: This mod completely revamps the underground dungeon systems in Romestead! Dive into deeper levels, discover new loot, and fight 3 brand new boss types. Make sure you bring extra torches!

Name: Better Farming Textures
Author: PixelWizard
Description: Upgrades all crop, soil, and farming equipment sprites to high-definition 32x32 textures. Includes seasonal variations for all standard Romestead crops.
